title: Forest City
subtitle: Integrated resort city · Iskandar Malaysia
intro: Forest City is a large-scale coastal development in Gelang Patah, Johor Bahru. This profile summarises public project information for overseas owners evaluating management, rental, or resale options.
seoTitle: Forest City Project Profile | Johor Bahru Property
seoDescription: Forest City project profile: location, property types, facilities, and owner services for overseas investors in Johor Bahru.
seoKeywords: Forest City profile, Forest City Johor, 森林城市, Iskandar Malaysia property, Forest City condo
whatsappMessage: Hi, I am researching Forest City and would like to discuss owner services.

gallery.alt: Forest City — Residential pool and facilities

facts.label: Region
facts.value: Southern Johor coast facing Singapore Strait

facts.label: Tenure
facts.value: Freehold / leasehold varies by phase — verify SPA

facts.label: Management
facts.value: Phase-specific JMB / MC and on-site management office

facts.label: Distance to Singapore
facts.value: Approx. 1–2 hours by road depending on traffic

facts.label: Owner Profile
facts.value: Overseas Chinese investors, regional buyers, holiday owners

map.label: Forest City, Gelang Patah, Johor Bahru

propertyTypes.name: Studio / 1-Bedroom
propertyTypes.desc: Compact units suited to singles or holiday stays. Popular for short-term rental where permitted by by-laws.

propertyTypes.name: 2-Bedroom
propertyTypes.desc: Most common investor layout. Balances rental demand with manageable furnishing costs for overseas owners.

propertyTypes.name: 3-Bedroom & Larger
propertyTypes.desc: Family-oriented layouts with sea or golf views. Often used for long-stay tenants or owner holidays.

facilities: Shuttle and transport links (subject to phase)
